commentary_text: The market assigns Croatia a 63% win probability versus the model's 47%, a 16-point gap favoring the favorite. The model rates Panama's chances at 23% while the market sees only 14%, an 9-point difference in the opposite direction. This sharpening of confidence in Croatia could reflect recent lineup changes, injury news affecting either squad, or current form information unavailable to the model's last training cycle. The dashboard flags this divergence as a signal worth monitoring rather than a judgment on which forecast will prove more accurate.
